creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
For the OpenSSL option, add this your your /etc/make.conf file (or, if using poudriere, a -make.conf file applicable to your build):

DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= ssl=openssl

That will build with OpenSSL from ports. :) Here is a testport:

root@132amd64-dvl:~ # ldd /usr/local/sbin/bacula-fd
/usr/local/sbin/bacula-fd:
	libintl.so.8 => /usr/local/lib/libintl.so.8 (0x16735c8aa000)
	libz.so.6 => /lib/libz.so.6 (0x16735cfde000)
	libbacfind-11.0.6.so => /usr/local/lib/libbacfind-11.0.6.so (0x16735d54c000)
	libbaccfg-11.0.6.so => /usr/local/lib/libbaccfg-11.0.6.so (0x16735de04000)
	libbac-11.0.6.so => /usr/local/lib/libbac-11.0.6.so (0x16735e4a5000)
	libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x16735f3f0000)
	libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x1673603eb000)
	libwrap.so.6 => /usr/lib/libwrap.so.6 (0x1673604f6000)
	libssl.so.11 => /usr/local/lib/libssl.so.11 (0x167360932000)
	libcrypto.so.11 => /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.11 (0x1673611fa000)
	liblzo2.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/liblzo2.so.2 (0x1673621d3000)
	libc++.so.1 => /usr/lib/libc++.so.1 (0x1673626bd000)
	libcxxrt.so.1 => /lib/libcxxrt.so.1 (0x167363402000)
	libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x167364645000)
	libgcc_s.so.1 => /lib/libgcc_s.so.1 (0x16736367e000)
	[vdso] (0x7ffffffff5d0)
root@132amd64-dvl:~ # pkg which /usr/local/lib/libssl.so.11
/usr/local/lib/libssl.so.11 was installed by package openssl-1.1.1v,1
